title: URAファイナルズ予選にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a long, hard road getting here, but it's
finally time for the URA Finale to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The battle to see who will rise to the top on this
shining stage... is about to kick off!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Stupendous! I see you've just finished seeing your
trainee off!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I might have set the stage, but you'll be the stars!
Please, make this race a hit!
choice_data_list: We'll make it one for the history books!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous! May your Umamusume's talents shine
brightly on the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the preliminaries for the URA Finale
begin!
